gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一段因误发语音而生的跨距离爱恋，笑中带泪的治愈系浪漫。
gems.whyWatchEn: A heartwarming and witty romance born from a misdirected voicemail, proving connection can bridge any distance.
gems.audience: 喜欢轻松浪漫、不落俗套的爱情故事，追求情感共鸣的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Audiences who enjoy light-hearted yet emotionally resonant romance that feels fresh and authentic.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 经典玩具与数字时代碰撞，科技感新角色带来全新冒险与温暖思考。
gems.whyWatchEn: Beloved toys face the digital age with new tech-themed friends, blending nostalgia with a clever take on modern childhood.
gems.audience: 全家共赏，尤其适合陪伴孩子成长、对数字时代亲子关系有思考的家庭。
gems.audienceEn: Families looking for a fun, thoughtful adventure that explores how technology shapes play and connection.
